accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: To detect your hotkey and paste into any app.

keyboardAccess.title: Keyboard access
keyboardAccess.descGranted: To detect your hotkey in any app.
keyboardAccess.descDenied: To detect your hotkey in any app, run sudo usermod -aG input $USER in a terminal, then log out and back in.
keyboardAccess.toggleNote: Until then, the hotkey only works in toggle mode.

pasteTool.title: Paste tool
pasteTool.desc: To paste into other apps, install {{tool}}: sudo apt install {{tool}}

modelSelector.cloudNote: Cloud models need an API key — we'll ask once.
modelSelector.requiredFor: Required to use {{model}}. Stored in your system keychain — never logged, never sent to us.
modelSelector.getKey: Don't have one? Get a {{provider}} key ↗
modelSelector.keyPlaceholder: Paste your secret key — e.g. sk-…

interfaceLanguage.label: Interface language
interfaceLanguage.desc: Change the language of the app interface.

application.autoUpdateDesc: Download new versions in the background as soon as they ship.
application.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically start Freestyle when you log in to your computer.
application.showOnLaunchDesc: Open the dashboard window when Freestyle starts.

recording.hotkeyDescHold: Hold the shortcut to record, release to transcribe.
recording.hotkeyDescToggle: Press the shortcut once to start, press again to stop.
recording.activationDescHold: Push-to-talk while the shortcut is held.
recording.activationDescToggle: Press the shortcut once to start, again to stop.
recording.outputModeDesc: Paste into the active app, or copy to clipboard.
recording.transcriptionPromptDesc: List domain terms, names, or jargon to nudge the speech model toward better accuracy.
recording.soundDesc: Soft chimes at the start and end of recording.
recording.needsModifier: Hotkeys need a modifier or side mouse button

display.themeDesc: Light, dark, or follow your system.
display.widgetPositionDesc: Where the floating pill appears on your screen.

permissions.microphoneDesc: Required to capture audio for transcription.
permissions.accessibilityDescMac: Required to detect the global hotkey and paste into other apps. Toggle Freestyle on under System Settings › Privacy & Security › Accessibility.
permissions.accessibilityDescOther: Required to detect the global hotkey and paste into other apps.

data.pauseHistoryDesc: Stop saving new transcription sessions to history until you turn this off.
data.historyDesc: Permanently delete every saved session — this can't be undone.
data.clearHistoryConfirm: Clear all transcription history? This permanently deletes every saved session.
data.logsDesc: App logs are saved to a file on your device. Open the folder to share them when reporting a problem.

developer.mcpDesc: Freestyle runs a local Model Context Protocol server so an AI agent (Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.) can manage your dictionary, vocabulary, and format rules. Add the connection below to your MCP client.
developer.mcpRemoteNote: Use this form for clients that don't support HTTP MCP servers directly, such as Claude Desktop.

today.noModelsYet: No models yet. Models will appear here as you dictate.
today.emptyTimeline: your day is unwritten — your first session will land here.

history.title: History
history.pausedDesc: New transcriptions are not being saved to history right now.
history.emptyDesc: Hold your hotkey anywhere on {{phrase}}, speak, release. Your first transcript will appear here.
history.noResultsDates: no transcripts found for this date range.
history.noResultsBoth: no transcripts match that search and date range.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.subtitle: Shortcuts that expand as you speak. Say the key, get the value.
dictionary.emptyDesc: Add a phrase you say often, like <example>my address</example> — and Freestyle expands it inline.
dictionary.noEntries: no entries — add one to start.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.modelCompatNote: Multi-word phrases work on Nova 3, OpenAI, and Groq. Nova 2 boosts single words. Scribe v1 does not use vocabulary bias.
vocabulary.emptyDesc: Add names, brands, or phrases you say often, like <example1>Nguyen</example1> or <example2>account number</example2>.
vocabulary.noTerms: no terms — add one to start.
vocabulary.importFailed: Import failed — file must be valid JSON.

formats.title: Formats
formats.appPatternHint: Matched against the app name, URL, and page title. Case-insensitive.
formats.instructionsPlaceholder: Tell the LLM how to format the text…
formats.empty: no formats yet — add one above.

models.title: Models
models.noApiKeys: No API keys yet — choose a cloud model above and you'll be prompted for a key.
models.deleteLocalMsg: Remove {{name}} from {{phrase}}. The weights are deleted from your local cache; you can download them again later.
models.deleteProviderMsgBase: Delete the {{provider}} API key? This also removes all configured models for this provider
models.deleteProviderCurrentSuffix: , including a model you're currently using

cleanup.title: Cleanup intensity

desc.low: Minimal edits — fix punctuation, capitalization, and obvious slips while keeping your exact wording and meaning.
desc.medium: Balanced — clean up grammar and awkward phrasing for readability, without changing your meaning or reordering your points.
desc.high: Polished — free to rephrase, reframe, and reorder for clarity and flow, while faithfully preserving your meaning and facts.
desc.custom: Custom — your own instructions control how the transcript is cleaned up.

cleanup.presetHint: Editing this prompt switches to Custom so presets stay intact.
cleanup.customHint: Your custom instructions are used for cleanup.

plugins.subtitle: Install plugins to add features. Each runs in the dictation pipeline and can ship its own page.
plugins.empty: Install a plugin to add features. Browse the available ones or add your own.
plugins.missingHint: Listed but not installed on disk. Uninstall to remove it.

detail.title: Details
detail.notFound: This plugin is no longer installed.
detail.noReadme: This plugin doesn't include a README.

browse.error: Couldn't load the plugin catalog. Check your connection and try again.
